Abstract: The growing demand for efficient, accessible, and reliable solutions in the construction and industrial sectors has led to the development of the HeavyEquip Marketplace—a digital platform designed to streamline the rental and listing of heavy machinery such as cranes, excavators, bulldozers, and other industrial equipment. Offered through both a mobile application and a website, the platform connects equipment owners with potential renters, reducing time and effort traditionally required through manual processes. The system integrates GPS-based location services to display nearby available equipment and is developed using Flutter for the mobile interface and ReactJS for the web portal. Backend operations are powered by Firebase.
Thematic Area: Heavy equipment, Rental platform, Mobile application, Web development, Flutter, ReactJS, Firebase

FYP Title: UniPath: Enhancing Pathology with Synchronized AI
Abstract: UniPath is a unified AI-powered platform for digital pathology image analysis designed to automate tissue segmentation, cellular detection, and diagnostic classification. It integrates U-Net, StarDist, and ResNet-based classification models trained on colorectal cancer datasets to assist diagnostic decisions. Evaluated using mIoU, Dice Score, and classification accuracy.
Thematic Area: Digital Pathology, Medical AI, U-Net, StarDist, ResNet, Tumor Detection

Student Name: Syed Sabbi ul Hassan, Muhammad Yasir Raza Attari, Hassam Ahmed Swati
FYP Title: Decentralized AI on Edge IoT Based Network for Illegal Wood Cutting Detection
Abstract: This project proposes a decentralized AI-driven Edge IoT network leveraging TinyML for real-time illegal logging detection using Arduino Nano BLE 33 Sense devices. Suspicious activity triggers instant alerts via a React Native interface.
Thematic Area: Illegal logging detection, Decentralized AI, Edge IoT, TinyML, Real-time monitoring

Student Name: Mohamed Saad, Mohamed Dhilham, Rikhaz Ahamed
FYP Title: iNovatcs: Intelligent Traffic Control System with Anomaly Detection
Abstract: AI-based traffic optimization system using computer vision to detect accidents and fires, dynamically adjusting signal timings. Django dashboard enables real-time monitoring.
Thematic Area: Traffic Management, AI, Anomaly Detection, Django, Smart Cities

FYP Title: Dastkaari: AI-Powered E-Commerce Platform for Handicrafts
Abstract: AI-powered e-commerce platform promoting Pakistani handicrafts with AR-based visualization and KNN recommendation system. Built using Flutter and Firebase.
Thematic Area: Handicrafts, Augmented Reality, Recommendation System, E-Commerce, Machine Learning

Internal Supervisor: Dr. Mohsin Khan Jadoon, Dr. Babar
FYP Title: AI-Based Prediction of Insurance Claim Denials & Management
Abstract: Machine learning-based system using Random Forest, LightGBM, and XGBoost to predict and prevent insurance claim denials with dashboard visualization.
Thematic Area: Insurance Claims, Claim Denial Prediction, Machine Learning, Healthcare

FYP Title: AI-Driven Stock Price Prediction Using LSTM and GRU
Abstract: Deep learning-based stock prediction system using LSTM and GRU integrated with technical indicators and deployed using Streamlit.
Thematic Area: Stock Market Prediction, LSTM, GRU, Time-Series Analysis

Abstract: An intelligent restaurant recommendation system leveraging real-time data and recommendation algorithms to personalize dining decisions.

FYP Title: AI-Driven Design Analysis and Recommendation Platform
Abstract: AI-based web design optimization platform providing accessibility and UI improvement suggestions aligned with WCAG 2.1 standards.
Thematic Area: AI in Design, Web Accessibility, WCAG Compliance
